text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's Day and we're heading to a shrine
for our first visit of the year.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I have sighted Teio and McQueen.

I look toward the display TV in the electronics
store that Mihono Bourbon is pointing at.

text_block_list.name: Teio and McQueen
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year!
Tokai Teio and Mejiro McQueen are appearing on a program called New Year's Umamusume Special.

It looks like a talk show where they discuss this
year's races and the runners who are expected to
make headlines.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text:
So, both Mihono Bourbon and Rice Shower are
about to enter their senior year.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text:
They've become quite the hot topic within the
racing community. Do you think we should keep
an eye on those two?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, good question. Personally, I've had my eye
on Bourbon since she ran in the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: And everyone's been comparing her to me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So I think it's worth showing up to watch one of
her races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my. In that case, I'll likely be competing
against both of them in the upcoming spring
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Really? Think you can take the heat?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Whatever is that supposed to mean?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I am well aware of the rumors surrounding
Bourbon and Rice, as well as their true abilities.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But it doesn't stop me from running in my usual
way.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: True, true. Well, I suppose I'll root for ya!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You should take this more seriously, Teio! You're
talking like it's a game!

Their banter livens up the studio as the special
continues.

I'm curious about what will happen next, but we
need to hurry before it gets dark out.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Affirmative, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Bow twice, clap twice, bow once... Shrine worship
executed without error.

Mihono Bourbon performs her prayer with ample
vigor, leaving me curious as to what she wished
for.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: To win in my senior year.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Since I'm entering my senior year, I determined
this to be a suitable wish for my shrine visit.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, a causal relationship between prayer
and victory has not been scientifically proven...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Regardless, Mejiro McQueen and Tokai Teio are
both overwhelmingly talented.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is essential that I continue my training in order
to compete on the same level as them.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I understand that today is a day off, but I am
eager to train.

This sudden rise in determination was probably
sparked by that TV special we saw earlier.
choice_data_list: Let's use today to rest up.
Let's boost our luck with a fortune slip!
Let's try learning a new running technique.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Rest up? But...
choice_data_list: Resting is a big part of training too.
Resting is a big part of training too.

text_block_list.text:
I tell her to rest today so that she's prepared for
some harsh training tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Order acknowledged. I will recuperate today.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Before I begin... how do you suggest I go about
recuperating?
choice_data_list: Want to go for a walk?

text_block_list.text: And off we go.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, look at how high that kite is soaring.

We're able to spend a relaxing New Year's Day
together.

With tough opponents waiting for us in the near
future, I want to work even harder than ever
together to make sure we have a shot at beating
them!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Boost our luck with a fortune slip? Order
acknowledged.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, I do not understand how a piece of
paper can increase my luck.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: And what exactly is "fortune" to begin with?

Despite her being lost in a maze of questions, I
manage to persuade Mihono Bourbon to draw a
fortune slip.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: It says "great fortune."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you?

At the very least, we're able to spend a peaceful
New Year's Day together.

With tough opponents waiting for us in the near
future, I want to work even harder than ever
together to make sure we have a shot at beating
them!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Learn a new running technique? Order
acknowledged.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I shall devise, memorize, and execute a new
running technique that will be invaluable for my
senior year.
After she's done, we hurry back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The cause is unknown, but the atmosphere today
is more "pleasant" than usual.

Bourbon continues striving to perfect her new
technique until she is completely satisfied.

With tough opponents waiting for us in the near
future, I want to work even harder than ever
together to make sure we have a shot at beating
them!
